holdings.infoBox: LIMI is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are PLS Group stock at 12.22%, Albemarle at 7.10%, Guangzhou Tinci Materials Technology at 5.80%, Tianqi Lithium at 4.91%, and Liontown at 4.81%.

overview.description: The Themes Lithium & Battery Metal Miners ETF (LIMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of companies from around the world associated with mining, exploration, and refining of lithium and battery metals. The fund selects and weights companies based on revenue-based thematic scores. LIMI was launched on Sep 24, 2024 and is issued by Themes.
